title: Add items to cart and checkout - positive flow
steps: Navigate to the SauceDemo website URL.
Enter valid username and password in the respective fields.
Click the 'Login' button.
Locate the first item on the inventory page and click the 'Add to cart' button for it.
Click on the 'shopping cart icon' in the header.
Verify the item is present in the cart. Click the 'Checkout' button.
Enter a valid first name (e.g., 'John'), last name (e.g., 'Doe'), and postal code (e.g., '12345').
Click the 'Continue' button.
Verify the order summary page displays the correct item and shipping information. Click the 'Finish' button.
expectedResult: The 'Checkout Complete' page is displayed, showing a 'Thank you for your order!' message and a unique 'Order Number'.
edgeCases: Add multiple different items to the cart before proceeding to checkout.
Add the same item multiple times to the cart before checkout.
Verify cart contents are retained after navigating away from the cart page and returning.
Verify cart contents are retained after logging out and logging back in with the same user.

title: Checkout with missing shipping information - Negative Cases
preconditions: User can login with valid credentials (e.g., standard_user)
At least one item is added to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the SauceDemo website URL.
Enter valid username and password in the respective fields.
Click the 'Login' button.
Add a product to the cart.
Click on the 'shopping cart icon' in the header.
Click the 'Checkout' button.
Leave the 'First Name' field blank.
Click the 'Continue' button.
expectedResult: An error message 'Error: First Name is required' is displayed below the form fields.
edgeCases: Leave 'Last Name' field blank and attempt to continue.
Leave 'Postal Code' field blank and attempt to continue.
Enter only spaces in 'First Name' field and attempt to continue.
Enter only spaces in 'Last Name' field and attempt to continue.
Enter only spaces in 'Postal Code' field and attempt to continue.
Enter invalid characters (e.g., numbers, symbols) in 'First Name' and 'Last Name' fields and attempt to continue.
Enter non-numeric characters in 'Postal Code' field and attempt to continue.

title: Cart item persistence after refresh during checkout process
steps: Navigate to the SauceDemo website URL.
Enter valid username and password in the respective fields.
Click the 'Login' button.
Add an item to the cart.
Click on the 'shopping cart icon' in the header.
Verify the item is present in the cart. Click the 'Checkout' button.
On the shipping information page, refresh the browser page.
Verify the item is still present in the cart after refresh. Click the 'Continue' button.
Enter valid shipping information.
Click the 'Finish' button.
expectedResult: The item added to the cart is retained after the page refresh. The 'Checkout Complete' page is displayed with a 'Thank you for your order!' message.
edgeCases: Refresh the page on the inventory page after adding an item to the cart.
Refresh the page on the cart page after adding an item.
Refresh the page on the order summary page before clicking 'Finish'.
Test cart persistence after a prolonged period of inactivity (simulating session timeout, if applicable).
